channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner — Social
channel.description: Tweet-ready feed of high-signal SEC filings: M&A, activist, tender offers, going-private, strategic reviews, divestitures.

item.title: $CALC 📍 Stake Receives 13D from Alafi Capital; 17.1% stake Mcap $16M · EV $15M · Healthcare
$ATER 📤 Divestiture Sells substantially all assets to Trademark Global; vote adjourned to July 17 Mcap $11M · EV $12M · Cons Disc
$LSTA 🎯 Tender Tender offer extended to July 16; 56% tendered at $4.00 + CVR Kuva Labs · $36.5M cash + CVR deal · cash · close 2026-07-16 Mcap $29M · EV $16M · Healthcare
